extraction.one_line_summary: FUGLSANG Jakob attacked from the breakaway with 7km to go, holding off YATES Adam who countered ROGLIC Primož on the final circuit to gain 18 seconds.
tactical_patterns: Astana executed identical pressure tactics two consecutive days, indicating repeatable blueprint for attacking favorites on multi-climb circuits.
YATES attacked ROGLIC multiple times before finally splitting him, revealing ROGLIC unable to respond after sustained accelerations.
FUGLSANG bridged from original breakaway to leaders 7km out, exploiting descending advantage while GC contenders watched each other.

rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: demonstrated superior form by inflicting 18-second gap on pre-race favorite ROGLIC through repeated accelerations
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primož: negative: let YATES wheel slip and could not respond to decisive move, losing 18 seconds despite being race favorite
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: reading race from breakaway perfectly, attacked with 7km remaining and held 38-53 second gaps while descending faster than chasers
